display: Initialisiere eine neue Webseite mit Vite und Tailwind CSS in diesem Ordner.

1.content:
Please set up a live-sync environment for this project. I want every file change I make to be uploaded immediately to my SFTP server without manual deployment.

1. Install 'chokidar' and 'ssh2-sftp-client' as development dependencies.
2. Create a '.env' file with placeholders for: SFTP_HOST, SFTP_USER, SFTP_PASS, SFTP_PORT (default 22), and SFTP_REMOTE_PATH.
3. Create a 'watch.js' script that uses chokidar to watch the current directory and uploads any changed file to the server instantly.
4. Add a script command to 'package.json' called "watch" that runs 'node watch.js'.
5. Ensure '.env' is added to '.gitignore' for security.

After creating these files, explain briefly how I should start the watcher.

Stop! There is a path error in my previous prompt. 
The current project path MUST be: D:\Eigene Dateien\Webseiten\Maxiworx\

Please do the following:
1. Move all files you just created from 'D:\Eigene Dateien\Wilde_Jungs\xampp\htdocs\maxiworx\' to 'D:\Eigene Dateien\Webseiten\Maxiworx\'.
2. From now on, only work within 'D:\Eigene Dateien\Webseiten\Maxiworx\'.
3. Confirm once the files are moved, so my live-sync watcher can pick them up.

display: All files are moved. Now, please perform a small 'touch' on all main PHP files (like index.php, booking.php, etc.) by adding a single space at the end of the files and saving them. This will trigger the live-sync watcher to start the initial upload to IONOS.
I have corrected the .env file. Now, please touch all PHP files in the main directory again (add a space and save) so the watcher can upload them to the new, correct path.

1.content:
You are my lead developer for a modular PHP CMS called VeloCMS. We are building it from scratch. I have no development experience — guide me through every step and explain what you are doing. Ask me before doing anything that cannot be undone.

Core principle: Everything is built so that you (Claude Code) and future AI agents can work as autonomously as possible.

SERVER: Ubuntu 26.04 LTS, IP 95.217.185.113, connected via SSH.
GITHUB: Sascha-Zielke/velocms (private repo, already created)
STACK: PHP 8.2+, MySQL, Nginx, Vanilla JS, multi-site with tenant separation at DB level.

Start with Step 1 only:
Create a file called VELOCMS_MASTERPLAN.md in /var/www/velocms/ — create that directory first if it does not exist. The file should contain the complete project architecture, full feature list and development conventions. This is our single source of truth for the entire project.

Action required from you

  1. Go to: https://github.com/Sascha-Zielke/velocms/settings/keys
  2. Click "Add deploy key"
  3. Title: velocms-server-deploy
  4. Key: paste this entire line:
  ssh-ed25519 AAAAC3NzaC1lZDI1NTE5AAAAIDIUnK2SICD9zGKKJ2nk0PcoU+NWpVBdR+A6+gXG/piH velocms-server-deploy
  5. Check "Allow write access" (we need to push code)
  6. Click "Add key"

  Tell me when that's done and I'll test the connection and push the project skeleton.

  ---

  ▎ What you saved — please keep these safe in a password manager:
  ▎
  ▎ | What                        | Value                        |
  ▎ |-----------------------------|------------------------------|
  ▎ | MySQL root password         | rT4vydidWnsEKLSjwol11IHW2t6V |
  ▎ | MySQL velocms user password | xXP41rzY9n0haVsQILOX6F8BvREJ |
  ▎
  ▎ The MySQL root password is for emergencies only. The velocms password goes in the .env files we create
  ▎ later.

display: Before Step 4: secure the server first. Create a new sudo user, disable root SSH login, change SSH port to 2222, set up UFW firewall (allow only ports 80, 443, 2222), and install Fail2Ban. Guide me through every step and warn me before anything that locks us out.
"it works" — if you got in and sudo printed root | What is the Username for the new passoword?

C:\Users\Sascha Zielke>ssh -p 2222 velocms@95.217.185.11
ssh: connect to host 95.217.185.11 port 2222: Connection refused

C:\Users\Sascha Zielke>ssh -p 2222 root@95.217.185.113
root@95.217.185.113: Permission denied (publickey).

The git push failed with permission denied. The deploy key was set up under root but we now use the velocms user. Please fix the GitHub deploy key so the velocms user can push to the repo, then continue with Step 5.
Stop. Do not use my real password in bash commands — it will be visible in the terminal history. Use a placeholder like ADMIN_PASS or read it from the .env file instead.
it works. i see the login-page and the dashbord.
Please activate the cron job on the server and then show me a summary of everything that has been built so far, with the current URL where I can access the admin panel.

DNS is now pointing webzite-newmedia.com and www.webzite-newmedia.com to this server (95.217.185.113). Please: 1) Update the Nginx config to use webzite-newmedia.com as server_name, 2) Install Let's Encrypt SSL certificate for webzite-newmedia.com and www.webzite-newmedia.com using Certbot, 3) Set up auto-renewal. Then continue with the CI/CD pipeline.
Please reset the admin password and show me the new credentials securely.
Please clear the terminal history on the server to remove the password from logs, and also show me how to change the admin password after first login.
https://webzite-newmedia.com/admin/profile: “Change Password” is displayed as plain text, with no clickable link.
Audit complete. Please update RESUME.md and SESSION_LOG.md to reflect the completed audit. Then push to GitHub. After that, wait for my next instruction.

1.content:
The admin panel is not responsive. Please make it fully responsive for tablet and mobile. Work autonomously through all steps without asking for confirmation unless something is irreversible or unclear.

Steps:
1. Audit all admin views for mobile compatibility
2. Make the sidebar collapsible on mobile (hamburger menu)
3. Make all tables scrollable horizontally on small screens
4. Make all forms usable on tablet and mobile
5. Test on 375px (mobile), 768px (tablet), 1280px (desktop)
6. After responsive fixes are done, run a full audit:
   - PHP syntax check on all files
   - Run PHPUnit (all 23 tests must pass)
   - Check for any new unescaped output
   - Clean up any temp files
7. Update RESUME.md and SESSION_LOG.md
8. Push everything to GitHub
9. Give me a final report of what was changed and the audit results

For any bash command that requires approval, choose the least destructive option automatically. Only stop and ask me if something could break the live site.

3.content:
Two things:

1. The Booking module is not appearing in Admin → Settings. Please fix this so the Booking module settings tab appears correctly in the admin panel. Then let me verify it before continuing.

2. Add this rule to your workflow: When I confirm a phase or module is complete, you automatically run /clear before starting the next phase. Add this to CLAUDE_START.md and VELOCMS_MASTERPLAN.md.

Start with fix #1 and show me when it's ready to verify.

4.content:
The Booking settings page shows plain text inputs instead 
of toggle switches for boolean settings (Enable Booking 
Module, Allow Guest Bookings, Require Manual Confirmation, 
Google Calendar Sync). 

Please fix these to use the same styled toggle switches 
used elsewhere in the admin panel. When done, push to 
GitHub and tell me to verify.

5.content:
Three final core fixes for the Booking module, 
then we freeze the core and move on:

1. PRICE INPUT: Package and Product price fields 
must be directly typeable number inputs — not 
spinner buttons only. Keep the up/down arrows 
but allow direct keyboard input. Auto-save on 
blur (no save button needed).

2. DATE VALIDATION: In the admin booking 
create/edit form, when Daily pricing type is 
selected, set check-out date minimum to 
check-in date + 1 day dynamically via JavaScript. 
Block form submission if check-out is before or 
equal to check-in.

3. TIME SLOTS — 15 minute intervals only: 
Replace free time input with a select dropdown 
showing only 15-minute intervals (00:00, 00:15, 
00:30, 00:45, 01:00 ... 23:45). Apply to all 
time pickers in the booking forms.

After these three fixes: run PHPUnit, push to 
GitHub, update RESUME.md and SESSION_LOG.md. 
Mark Booking Core as COMPLETE in the masterplan. 
Then perform /clear to prepare for the next module.

display:
Help me fix the issues reported by /doctor below.

For each issue: briefly explain what the fix will do, then ask me to confirm before running any shell command that deletes files, modifies global config, or changes my installation. Safe read-only checks are fine without asking. If a suggested fix looks wrong for my setup, say so instead of running it.

- Settings (C:\Users\Sascha Zielke\.claude\settings.json › permissions.defaultMode): Invalid value. Expected one of: "acceptEdits", "auto", "bypassPermissions", "default", "dontAsk", "plan"
  Suggested fix: Valid modes: "acceptEdits" (ask before file changes), "plan" (analysis only), "bypassPermissions" (auto-accept all), or "default" (standard behavior)
